For 20 years, the Sustainability Awards have set the benchmark for excellence in Australia’s built environment — recognising projects, organisations and individuals delivering measurable, lasting sustainability impact. Long before sustainability became standard practice, the Awards championed leadership, innovation and credibility.

2025 Sustainability Awards Winners

On November 19, Sydney’s iconic Town Hall hosted the Sustainability Awards Gala, uniting over 300 attendees, including jurors, partners, and industry leaders. The night celebrated innovation and connection, highlighting the industry’s unwavering commitment to sustainability.

Over 250 outstanding projects, people, and products were submitted, making the selection of finalists a challenging task for our expert jury.

About Sustainability Awards

The Sustainability Awards is Australia’s longest-running and most prestigious awards program dedicated to acknowledging and celebrating excellence in sustainable design and architecture. Entries received are reviewed by a panel of judges and winners in 18 categories are announced at the five-star Sustainability Awards gala evening hosted at the Museum of Contemporary Art, Sydney, on 12 November 2026.

Sustainability Summit 2026
Frequently Asked Questions
When Is The 2026 Sustainability Summit?

The 2026 Sustainability Summit is on Thursday, 12th November 2026.

Is The Sustainability Summit Online Or In-Person?

The 2026 Sustainability Summit is an in person event only.

The event is being held at The Fullerton Hotel, 1 Martin Place, Sydney, NSW, 2000.
